message: fix(ci): harden full release validation monitors

files.patch:
@@ -227,6 +227,7 @@ jobs:
               fi
               sleep 30
             done
+            trap - EXIT INT TERM
 
             conclusion="$(gh run view "$run_id" --json conclusion --jq '.conclusion')"
             url="$(gh run view "$run_id" --json url --jq '.url')"
